name: Rage
description: (Bonus action: 4/rest) For 1 minute, gain +3 to dmg rolls, resist to melee dmg, and STR advantage. Ends if not in combat. Immune to charm and fear while raging.

name: Frenzy
description: Activate when raging: allows you to make an additional attack as a bonus action each turn.  After rage ends, you die, but next character gains +1 to hit / dmg / spell save DC.

name: Intimidating Presence
description: As an action, menace a creature that can see and hear you. If it fails a DC 15 WIS save, it becomes afraid of you for the next turn.

name: Reckless Attack
description: Before you attack each turn, gain advantage on attack rolls for the rest of the turn. Enemies gain advantage on attack rolls against you until your next turn.

name: My Turn
description: (1/rest) As a reaction, you can interrupt an enemy turn which is after you on the initiative order to take an immediate charge attack against that enemy (if in range)

name: Bardic Inspiration
description: (3/rest) As a bonus action, grant a hearing-range character a 1d8 bonus to a d20 roll of their choice in the next 10 minutes. Max 1 bonus die at a time per character.")

name: Healing Word
description: (6/rest) As a bonus action, target in line of sight gains 1d4+7 HP. No effect on undead and constructs.

name: Shatter
description: (3/rest) In a 10-foot radius area, each creature takes 1d8+10 thunder dmg or half on a DC 15 CON save. Inorganic creatures have disadvantage.

name: Confusion
description: (2/rest) In a 10-foot radius area, each creature is driven to confusion for up to 1 minute unless they succeed on a DC 15 WIS save. Can reattempt save each turn.

name: Hold Monster
description: (1/rest) Target creature is paralyzed for up to 1 minute unless they succeed on a DC 15 WIS save. Can reattempt save each turn. Undead are immune.

name: Turn Undead
description: (2/rest) Channel divine power, destroying CR1 and lower undead and 'turning' the rest, if they fail a DC 14 WIS save.

name: Healing Word
description: (6/rest) As a bonus action, target in line of sight gains 2d4+4 HP. No effect on undead and constructs.

name: Guilding Bolt
description: (5/rest) +6 to hit, line of sight, 1d4+6 radiant damage

name: Flame Strike
description: (3/rest) In a 10 foot radius, target must save DC 14 DEX save or take 1d4+9 fire dmg AND 1d4+9 radiant damage, or half on a success

name: Holy Sacrifice
description: (1/ever) Touch target creature - sacrifice your life to deal 5d6+30 dmg or 5d10+30 if target is undead or demonic. Your next character is blessed with +1 atk/dmg/spell save DC.

name: Wild Shape
description: (2/rest) As a reaction, shift into beast form, gaining one benefit: +4 AC and +20 total HP; 2x claw atk (melee) +11 to hit, 1d6+4 dmg; can fly at speed 40; or, can swim at speed 40.

name: Cure Wounds
description: (5/rest) Touch a creature - it regains 1d8+11 HP. No effect on undead and constructs.

name: Lesser Restoration
description: (4/rest) Touch a creature - you remove 1 disease or condition: blinded, deafened, paralyzed, or poisoned.

name: Flaming Sphere
description: (3/rest) CONCENTRATION - Create a 5-foot sphere. Any adjacent creature ending its turn takes 3d6 fire dmg or half on a DC 14 DEX save. Move/ram up to 30 ft as a bonus action.

name: Insect Plague
description: (1/rest) CONCENTRATION - Insects engulf a 20-ft radius area. 4d10 piercing dmg or half on a DC 14 CON save when it appears and when creatures enter or end their turns there.

name: Action Surge
description: (1/rest) As your bonus action, take an additional action this turn

name: Indominatible
description: (1/rest) As a reaction, reroll a failed saving throw

name: Second Wind
description: (1/rest) As a reaction, restore 1d10+10 HP

name: Overpower
description: (1/rest) When you succeed in a melee attack you may push your opponent 10' in any direction

name: Sacrifice
description: (1/rest) As a reaction, you can choose to take the damage intended for an adjacent ally

name: Step of the Wind
description: As a bonus action, take Dash or Disengage

name: Way of the Open Palm
description: Once per turn, when you hit a target, you can force them to either make a DC 15 STR save or be knocked back 15 ft, or make a DC 15 DEX save or be knocked prone

name: Wholeness of Body
description: (1/rest) Heal 30 HP

name: Deflect Missiles
description: As a reaction, deflect or catch a ranged projectile that hits you, reducing the damage by 1d10+12

name: Evasion
description: Effects that cause full dmg on failed DEX saves now cause half dmg when you fail and no dmg when you succeed

name: Lay on Hands
description: (50 points/rest) As an action, touch a creature and restore HP from your points pool OR spend 5 points to purge 1 disease/poison

name: Divine Smite
description: (5/rest) Add 3d6 radiant dmg to a successful melee attack

name: Sacred Weapon
description: (1/rest) As an action, weapon is imbued with light, shedding light and gaining +5 bonus to hit and dmg for 1 min

name: Turn the Unholy
description: (1/rest) As an action, censure fiends and undead within 30'. All must make a DC 17 WIS save or be turned for 1 min

name: Revivify
description: (ONCE. Never comes back!): Reaction: Prevent a fatal blow to an ally (not yourself). The damage from the attack is reduced to 0.

name: Colossus Slayer
description: Once per turn, apply 1d8 additional dmg to a successful attack if target is below max HP

name: Volley
description: Choose a number of targets. You may attack that may targets this turn, with that number as a penalty to your attack rolls.

name: Shortsword
description: +8 to hit, Range melee, 1d8+2 dmg

name: Hunter's Mark
description: As a bonus action, mark a single target. Your attacks deal an extra 1d6 damage and you have advantage on checks made to find it if it hides or escapes.

name: Lightning Arrow
description: (3/rest) You fire an arrow in a line, piercing enemy creatures. Each creature in the line takes 4d6+16 lightning dmg or half on a DC 14 DEX save.

name: Sneak Attack
description: +1d6+16 dmg on a target with an ally adjacent, or that you have advantage against

name: Cunning Action
description: As a bonus action, use Dash, Hide, Disengage, Sleight of Hand, use thieves' tools, open a lock, disarm a trap, or use/open an object

name: Uncanny Dodge
description: (Reaction) Halve the dmg of an attack from an attacker you can see

name: Evasion
description: Effects that cause full dmg on failed DEX saves now cause half dmg when you fail and no dmg when you succeed

name: Throwing Dagger
description: +4 to hit, range: line of sight, 1d4+2 dmg

name: Font of Magic
description: (3/rest): Gain advantage on a spell's attack rolls, impose disadvantage on a spell's saving throws, or gain back use of another spell except Cone of Cold.

name: Scorching Ray
description: (4/rest) Fire three rays of fire at any number of targets. Each takes 1d6+4 fire damage.

name: Fireball
description: (2/rest) In a 20 foot radius sphere, each creature takes 1d6+28 fire dmg or half on a DC 15 DEX save.

name: Wall of Fire
description: (1/rest) Create a 60' x 20' x 5' wall of flame lasting 1 minute. Each creature within it takes 1d8+20 fire damage or half as much on a DC 15 DEX save.

name: Cone of Cold
description: (1/rest) Create a 60 foot cone of cold air, dealing 4d8+20 cold dmg or half as much on a DC 15 CON save. Creatures killed are frozen solid.

name: Master's Favor
description: (3/rest) Add 1d8+5 psychic dmg to any spell (even if it doesn't do dmg normally), or gain advantage before a d20 roll, or teleport 30 ft to a spot you can see as a bonus action.

name: Armor of Agathys
description: (4/rest) Gain 5 temporary HP for 1 hour. So long as you have at least 1 of these temp HP, if an enemy hits you with a melee attack, they take 5 cold damage.

name: Hold Person
description: (4/rest) CONCENTRATION - Target humanoid is paralyzed for up to 1 minute unless they succeed on a DC 15 WIS save. Can reattempt save each turn. Undead are immune.

name: Hypnotic Pattern
description: (2/rest) CONCENTRATION - Targets in a 30 foot cube are charmed and immobile for up to 1 minute unless they succeed on a DC 15 WIS save. Charm ends if roused or damaged.

name: Blight
description: (1/rest) Target creature takes 4d8+27 necrotic dmg or half on a DC 15 CON save. Plants have disadvantage and take max damage. Undead and constructs are immune.

name: Specialist
description: Pick one of your other spells (except Sunbeam) at creation. That spell (and only) that spell may be cast 5 additional times per rest.

name: Magic Missile
description: (3/rest) Send 3 darts of magical power at any number of targets. Each deals 1d4+1 dmg

name: Counterspell
description: (3/rest) As a reaction, interrupt a spell being cast by another creature. That creature can make a DC 25 INT check to try to recover the countered spell charge.

name: Evard's Black Tentacles
description: (3/rest) In a 20 foot square, creatures must succeed on a DC 12 DEX save or take 1d6+8 dmg and be restrained by black tentacles. Auto-dmg'd if restrained; STR or DEX to escape.

name: Sunbeam
description: (1/rest) Line of light pierces 60 feet; targets take 6d8 radiant dmg and are blinded or take half on DC 12 CON save. Undead and oozes: disadvantage. New line each round for 1 min.
